_comment: DEPLOYMENT INSTRUCTIONS: 1) Deploy code.js to Google Apps Script as backend API, 2) Deploy this dashboard to GitHub Pages/Netlify, 3) Update the 'inventory' URL below with your Google Apps Script deployment URL

app.name: BRAIN Operations Dashboard
app.description: Unified dashboard for all Branches Artificial Intelligence Network operational tools

inventory._comment: Inventory backend — URL is now server-side (gas-proxy). No URL needed here.
inventory.name: Clippings - Inventory Management
inventory.description: Search inventory, manage stock, track equipment

grading._comment: Repair vs Replace Tool — URL kept here because it loads as an iframe (cannot be proxied)
grading.name: Repair vs Replace
grading.description: Equipment repair cost analysis and replacement decisions

scheduler._comment: Crew Scheduler — GAS web app loaded as iframe
scheduler.name: Daily Scheduler
scheduler.description: Crew scheduling with drag-and-drop for crew members, trucks, equipment, jobs, and salesmen

tools._comment: Hand Tool Checkout — GAS web app loaded as iframe
tools.name: Hand Tool Checkout
tools.description: Hand tool checkout with stacked tool view, drag-and-drop to crews, and physical tag tracking

chessmap._comment: DRL Chess Map - Real-time crew location tracking and logistics planning
chessmap.name: DRL Chess Map & Logistics
chessmap.description: Real-time crew location tracking, logistics planning, and vendor proximity

activeJobs._comment: Active Jobs Dashboard — URL is now server-side (gas-proxy)
activeJobs.name: Active Jobs Dashboard
activeJobs.description: Work order management with PDF parsing and progress tracking

truckcheck._comment: Weekly Truck Checks — GAS web app loaded as iframe. Sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1CxcceErS6SDUmELLwv5BL9m2OPhD3k8lf3_JzOMP6NQ/edit?gid=1444929380#gid=1444929380
truckcheck.name: Weekly Truck Checks

tvdashboard._comment: TV Dashboard — local page loaded as iframe
tvdashboard.name: TV Dashboard

shoptickets._comment: Shop Tickets — GAS web app loaded as iframe. Sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1MrCkKyyivmMuNL-KkHlcnyChhox9D_2v1kHCIH2cBDM/edit?gid=0#gid=0
shoptickets.name: Shop Tickets

ai._comment: API key is now server-side (CLAUDE_API_KEY env var in Netlify)
ai.fallbackMessage: I can help you with inventory, grading decisions, scheduling, tool rentals, logistics planning, or crew location tracking. What would you like to do?
ai.routingPrompt: Analyze this query and determine which tool would be most helpful: inventory management, plant grading, scheduling, tool checkout, logistics planning, or crew location map. Return only: 'inventory', 'grading', 'scheduler', 'tools', 'logistics', 'chessmap', or 'general'.

agents._comment: Agent URLs are now server-side (gas-proxy env vars). Only metadata and keywords remain here.

inventory.name: Clippings
inventory.description: Inventory, plants, stock, supplies, fleet, trucks

repair.name: GradeBot
repair.description: Equipment repair vs replace, asset grading, maintenance costs

jobs.name: Foreman
jobs.description: Active work orders, job progress, line items, crew dispatch

scheduler.name: Scheduler
scheduler.description: Crew scheduling, daily assignments, who worked on what job, crew history, availability, absent

deployment._comment: Deployment strategy: Backend (code.js) goes to Google Apps Script. Frontend (this dashboard) goes to GitHub Pages or Netlify.

backend.instructions: Deploy code.js to Google Apps Script as a Web App, then update services.inventory.url with the deployment URL

frontend.instructions: Deploy these files to static hosting. Update config.json with backend URL before deployment.
